creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Hi Doug,

I worte a patch a view days before see PR
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=134347
vesus
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=134545

Patch for PR 134347 was also sent to upstream OpenBSD (Bug ID 6142)
and is already megerged in the next version of spamd-4.5.0.

It is not a good idea to have this done with your patch, which use all
params from spamd (-G) since spamlogd can only adjust whiteexp and not 
passtime/greyexp.


@freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org / edwin
Please close PR 134545

olli
